stats.fact: Global NLP in healthcare market projected to grow from $5.62 billion in 2026 to $36.71 billion by 2034 (CAGR 26.45%)
Global AI in healthcare market valued at $51.20 billion in 2026, projected to reach $613.81 billion by 2034 (CAGR 36.83%)
61% of medical technology respondents are using AI for medical imaging in 2026
More than 173 AI-discovered drug programs are in clinical development as of early 2026, with 94 in Phase I, 56 in Phase II, 15 in Phase III
AI-driven discharge risk stratification leads to 30-45% reduction in 30-day hospital readmissions

stats.fact: AI ambient documentation returns 1.5-2 hours to clinicians every day previously lost to documentation tasks
